name: OpenProject Notifications
description: Two top-panel indicators for OpenProject, backed by the openproject-cli tool. The first shows in-app notifications (unread badge, list with mark read/unread, open in browser, banners). The second lists your current and previously-assigned tasks (newest first) and summarises logged vs planned work hours from your start date, colouring the icon green/yellow/red. Connection is configured once via 'openproject-cli auth login'. Works on GNOME 49-50.
